key_finding: BUG-001 FIXED — Clusters page loads correctly with full data table. Both voyager-api and voyager-web confirmed running v190.
author: mai

bugs.description: Console 404 error on health.status and webhooks.list tRPC batch endpoints
bugs.impact: Cosmetic — pages load with available data, no visible user-facing failure
bugs.steps: Open browser console on any page after login
bugs.actual: 404 on /trpc batch calls containing health.status and webhooks.list

notes: v190 deploy confirmed via Deployments page. BUG-001 (Clusters page 'Failed to load data' error) is resolved. The page now loads a proper table with cluster data including status, provider, version, nodes. Add Cluster wizard opens correctly with 5 provider options (Kubeconfig, AWS EKS, Azure AKS, Google GKE, Minikube/Local). Minor issue: 404 on health.status and webhooks.list in tRPC batch calls visible in console but non-breaking. Score deducted 0.2 for console 404s.
